name: Lisas Twice Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 6 large baking potatoes, baked until tender
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cooled potatoes in half.
2. Scoop out the centers and place the shells on a cookie sheet.
3. Place the potato centers in a bowl and mix with 1 cup of shredded cheddar cheese, remaining ingredients (cream cheese, sour cream, green onions), salt, pepper, and paprika until well combined.
4. Spoon the mixture back into the potato shells.
5. Sprinkle the remaining shredded cheddar cheese and paprika on top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until heated through and the cheese is bubbly on top.
